title: Smoky Pilaf with Crispy Celery
description: A flavorful and crunchy pilaf dish made with smoky spices and crispy celery. Perfect for a quick and easy meal.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the gshattering (garlic) and cook for 1 minute.
Add the smoky spices and cook for another minute.
Add the pilaf to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the celery to the pan and cook until crispy.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
